---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the ACIF web tool or framework
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g., "It's difficult to..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Which component does this affect?
- [ ] Web Tool (Dashboard, Risk Classifier, Pipeline, Age Checker, Hallucination Log, Content Registry)
- [ ] Framework Document (specific section: ___)
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
